question: Will MicroStrategy hold 600k+ BTC before July?
resolution_criteria:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if MicroStrategy Incorporated holds 600,000 or more bitcoins at any point by June 30, 2025, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

The resolution source for this market will announcements from MicroStrategy or Michael Saylor as to their total BTC holdings.
